title: Iterators, Generators, and Lazy Pipelines · Language Clinic: Python Itertools Pipelines
summary: Stream large activity exports through bounded-memory validation and aggregation stages. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python itertools pipelines increment in a lazy activity-processing pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Compose islice, chain, pairwise, groupby, accumulate, and combinatoric tools with sortedness and memory constraints.
Use generator expressions for single-pass pipelines while materializing when reuse or random access is required.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
